extortion.description: Since its creation, MagicLand has recorded about 3 million unique visitors. In 2014, with 800,000 visitors, Rainbow MagicLand was  confirmed as the third theme park in Italy. Within the next few d ays Rainbow MagicLand will be confirmed to cause the leak persona l data: bank information (swift codes, BIC, IBAN), EU ID numbers, accounting and HR files.
